articles.headline: Al Nassr coach quells injury fears after Cristiano Ronaldo limps off

articles.headline: Matildas show support for Women's Asian Cup opponents Iran

articles.headline: Jordi Alba debuts alongside legends at Soccer Aid 2026
articles.description: Former Barcelona and Spain legend Jordi Alba will make his debut in the 20th edition of Soccer Aid for UNICEF, taking place on May 31 at the London Stadium.

articles.headline: Real Madrid drop 2nd in a row, insist LaLiga race not over
articles.description: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa insisted that the LaLiga title race isn't over after his team's surprise 1-0 home defeat to Getafe left them four points behind leaders Barcelona.

articles.headline: Late drama as Real Madrid suffer title blow in Getafe defeat

articles.headline: Moreno: Real Madrid lacking a 'game plan' after consecutive LaLiga defeats

articles.headline: Real Madrid loses ground in title chase with 1-0 loss to Getafe
